  Pet food recall expanded after rickets, elevated vitamin levels reported:
  Return ASAP - MassLive

  https://news.google.?oc=5

summary: >-
  Revival Animal Health has expanded its recall of Breeder’s Edge Foster Care
  Canine, Shelter’s Choice Canine Milk Replacer, and Breeder’s Edge Foster Care
  GM (goat milk) milk replacers due to variable vitamin D levels. Testing
  confirmed elevated vitamin D in the goat milk formula, and at least two
  rickets complaints have been reported. Affected products, sold nationwide
  online and in retail pet stores, may cause vomiting, diarrhea, weakness,
  weight loss, and kidney calcification if vitamin D is too high; low vitamin D
  in puppies can cause rickets, bone deformities, and lameness. Owners should
  stop using the products immediately and contact Revival Animal Health at
  1-877-870-4059 for a full refund.

location: 'Nationwide (United States), online and in retail pet stores'
---
Revival Animal Health has expanded its recall of Breeder’s Edge Foster Care Canine, Shelter’s Choice Canine Milk Replacer, and Breeder’s Edge Foster Care GM (goat milk) milk replacers due to variable vitamin D levels. Testing confirmed elevated vitamin D in the goat milk formula, and at least two rickets complaints have been reported. Affected products, sold nationwide online and in retail pet stores, may cause vomiting, diarrhea, weakness, weight loss, and kidney calcification if vitamin D is too high; low vitamin D in puppies can cause rickets, bone deformities, and lameness. Owners should stop using the products immediately and contact Revival Animal Health at 1-877-870-4059 for a full refund.

[Read the full report on MassLive →](https://news.google.?oc=5)
